formatAssistant.title: Format Assistant
formatAssistant.description: Convert Markdown documents to rich text formats for platforms like WeChat
formatAssistant.enableFormatAssistantDesc: Convert Markdown to rich text format, supporting WeChat, Bilibili and other platform themes
